title: For the choirmaster. A Psalm of David.

verses.1: How long, O LORD? Will You forget me forever? How long will You hide Your face from me?
verses.2: How long must I wrestle in my soul, with sorrow in my heart each day? How long will my enemy dominate me?
verses.3: Consider me and respond, O LORD my God. Give light to my eyes, lest I sleep in death,
verses.4: lest my enemy say, “I have overcome him,” and my foes rejoice when I fall.
verses.5: But I have trusted in Your loving devotion; my heart will rejoice in Your salvation.
verses.6: I will sing to the LORD, for He has been good to me.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
